text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #2)
root@localhost:~ # pkg info firefox | grep -A 5 Annotations
Annotations    :
	FreeBSD_version: 1302001
	cpe            : cpe:2.3:a:mozilla:firefox:117.0:::::freebsd13:x64:1
	no_provide_shlib: yes
	repo_type      : binary
	repository     : FreeBSD
